Description: Bookable truck & trailer parking off I-65 Exit 65 in Munfordville, on the CTS/CB-shop lot on Main St. 24/7 access; approximately 6 spaces bookable daily/weekly/monthly via Truck Parking Club. On-site CB shop; dining and Walgreens nearby.

KYTC rest area on I-65 Northbound near mile marker 59 (Hart County, between Horse Cave and Munfordville). Separate truck and passenger parking (100+ well-lit spaces), restrooms, picnic area, vending. Repeat winner of Kentucky's Best Maintained Rest Area award.
KYTC rest area on I-65 Southbound near mile marker 60 (Hart County, between Munfordville and Horse Cave). Separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms, picnic area, vending.
Baymont by Wyndham hotel at I-65 Exit 53 in Cave City advertising free RV/bus/truck (large-vehicle) parking.

Full-service Petro Stopping Center (TravelCenters of America brand, #330) at I-65 Exit 86 (KY-222, Glendale), Hardin County. Reported: 12 diesel lanes, 263 truck parking spaces, on-site CAT Scale, TA Truck Service (Petro:Lube, ~5 service bays), Iron Skillet restaurant, showers, laundry, bulk DEF, ATM. Open 24 hours. Adjacent to a standalone Blue Beacon Truck Wash.
CAT Scale certified truck scale co-located at the Petro Stopping Center #330, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale). One weigh per ticket, reweigh free at same location.

TA Truck Service commercial repair shop (Petro:Lube) co-located at Petro Stopping Center #330, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale). Approx. 5 service bays; road service, oil/lube, DOT inspections, brake/alignment, HVAC and electrical service, tire repair.

Description: Standalone Blue Beacon Truck Wash, a double-bay facility at I-65 Exit 86 next to the Petro Stopping Center (Petro Travel Plaza), Glendale. Services: truck/trailer exterior wash, trailer washouts, engine wash.

Pilot Travel Center #48 at I-65 Exit 86 (KY-222, Glendale), Hardin County. Reported: 11 diesel lanes, 11 bulk DEF lanes, 125 truck parking spaces, 8 showers, on-site CAT Scale, Wingfoot Truck Care (Goodyear commercial tire/service), McDonald's, laundry, ATM. Open 24 hours.
CAT Scale certified truck scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #48, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale).
Wingfoot Truck Care (Goodyear commercial tire & truck service) co-located at Pilot Travel Center #48, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale). Commercial tire sales/repair and truck service.

RaceTrac travel center #2597 (RaceTrac's first Kentucky location) near I-65 Exit 91 (US-31W / Dixie Ave, at the Western Kentucky Parkway junction), Elizabethtown. Reported CAT Scale / truck scale at RaceTrac #2597, near I-65 Exit 91 (Elizabethtown).

Love's Travel Stop #716 (opened March 2018) at 601 S Ring Road, Elizabethtown, at the I-65 / Western Kentucky Parkway junction (signed WK Parkway Exit 133; immediately adjacent to I-65 in the Elizabethtown freight hub). Love's Truck Care shop (approx. 3 service bays) co-located at Love's Travel Stop #716, Elizabethtown. Commercial tire sales/repair, oil change and PM services, light mechanical/road service.

Plaza 94, a small independent fuel/travel plaza at I-65 Exit 94 (US-62 / N Mulberry St), Elizabethtown. Reported: diesel, approx. 5 truck parking spaces, deli/restaurant, ATM, and an on-site truck wash.
Truck wash service reported on-site at Plaza 94, I-65 Exit 94, Elizabethtown.

Greenfield Inn & Suites (formerly Wingfield Inn & Suites) off I-65 Exit 94 (US-62), Elizabethtown. Offers free self parking with free RV, bus, and truck parking; 24-hour front desk, free breakfast, indoor pool.

Description: Best Western Plus Elizabethtown Inn & Suites off I-65 Exit 94 (US-62 / N Mulberry St), Elizabethtown. 92 rooms; free parking with outside uncovered parking that accommodates buses, boats and large vehicles (truck parking); free hot breakfast, indoor saltwater pool, fitness center.

Description: Permanent Kentucky state weigh/inspection station on I-65 Southbound near Elizabethtown, Hardin County (KSP Post 3 area), located between I-65 Exit 105 (to the north) and Exit 86 Glendale (to the south). Fixed scale with NORPASS/PrePass bypass capability.
